@graph.name: CS Services in Manipur | Virtual Auditor
@graph.description: CS Services in Manipur. From ₹5,000. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. Company secretarial services — annual ROC filings, board res. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: What is included in annual ROC filing?

acceptedAnswer.text: AOC-4 (financial statements), MGT-7 (annual return), ADT-1 (auditor appointment). Due within 30-60 days of AGM.
Yes. DIR-12 for appointment/resignation, DIR-3 KYC annual update, DIN deactivation if needed.

mainEntity.name: What happens if ROC filings are delayed?

acceptedAnswer.text: Additional fees of ₹100/day per form. Prolonged default can lead to company strike-off and director disqualification.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide cs services services in Manipur?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Manipur from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Manipur?

acceptedAnswer.text: Companies registered in Manipur fall under ROC Shillong. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Manipur-registered companies.

mainEntity.name: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Manipur?

acceptedAnswer.text: Stamp duty in Manipur: As per state schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
